title: hearth.inference.error v1
description: Emitted by hearth-nbus when an LLM inference call fails or times out. Includes latency metadata to help distinguish network vs. model errors.

task.description: Task description or intent class that was being attempted.

latency_ms.description: Observed latency in milliseconds before the error occurred.

reason.description: Error message or code returned by the inference layer.
